title: Bao Bites with Irish Potatoes
description: A simple and tasty snack made with Irish potatoes, bao, and a hint of dreamy flavors.
instructions: In a bowl, mix diced Irish potatoes with melted butter, salt, and a hint of dreamy cheese.
Split the bao in half and place a spoonful of potato mixture onto each half.
Top with additional shredded dreamy cheese if desired.
Place the bao bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bao is crispy.
